Privacy Policy

TrueKnack is committed to protecting your privacy and personal information.

Home / Privacy Policy

Effective Date: June 18, 2026

TrueKnack ("we", "us", or "our") operates the TrueKnack training institute site. This page informs you of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data when you use our website or register for our banking training programs.

1. Information We Collect

We collect personal information to provide and improve our services, including processing program inquiries and admissions. The types of information we collect include:

  • Personal Identifiers: Full name, age, gender.
  • Contact Information: Phone number, email address, current city/location.
  • Academic & Career Information: Qualification details, current graduation status, and resume data for placement opportunities.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the collected information for various purposes, including:

  • To process admissions and register you for training modules.
  • To contact you regarding course detail inquiries, career counselling, and program eligibility checks.
  • To share your academic and resume profiles with our prospective recruiters and partner banks for job placements.
  • To provide customer support and improve our training material.

3. Data Protection & Safety

We implement strict security measures to keep your data secure. Your personal data is only shared with recognized banking institutions, recruiters, and placement officers engaged to secure your employment post-graduation. We do not sell or lease your personal information to third-party marketing networks.

4. Cookies Policy

Our website utilizes cookies to keep track of preferences and analyze website traffic through analytical tools. You may instruct your browser to refuse cookies, though doing so might restrict access to certain interactive elements of the site.

5. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update our Privacy Policy periodically. Any modifications will be posted directly on this page with an updated effective date. We recommend checking this page regularly for any updates.

6. Contact Us

If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy or how your personal information is handled, please reach out to us:

  • Email: info@trueknack.com
  • Phone Helpline: +91 91721 55613
  • Office Address: Wagle Industrial Estate, Thane West, Maharashtra - 400604

Grooming university graduates into high-performing professional retail banking assets. The Knack of Finding True Talent.
